analytical_conclusion: Map-only input achieves the highest IoU and Dice scores because map tiles are clean, stylized representations where roads have a consistent, easily detectable color signature. Satellite imagery is significantly harder — roads are occluded by shadows, vegetation, and varying lighting conditions, leading to lower segmentation performance. The combined model (satellite + map concatenated) has access to the most information theoretically, but in practice does not surpass map-only within 7 epochs, as the model requires additional training to learn the optimal weighting between the two modalities. Given sufficient epochs, the combined model is expected to achieve the best overall performance.
